name: cosync-obsidian-plugin
description: Real-time collaborative synchronization plugin for Obsidian using Yjs and WebSockets

scripts.build:dev: npm run build && mkdir -p /mnt/workspace/vault/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-cosync && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css /mnt/workspace/vault/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-cosync/
